title: German Seafood Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired seafood noodle soup perfect for a cold day. This recipe combines the delicate taste of white fish with the freshness of grassy parsley.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the noodles according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the white fish fillets to the pan and cook until opaque and flaky.
Add the parsley, dill, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss with the seafood and seasoning mixture.
Heat the soup to an internal temperature of at least 145°F (63°C) to ensure food safety.
Let the soup rest for 5 minutes before serving.
